description: Analyze household size distributions across San Francisco zones to identify family-oriented vs single-occupant neighborhoods using the UrbanSim dataset in the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/household_size_analysis.ipynb. Using the households, buildings, and parcels tables from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, determine the zone_id for each household and categorize them into '1-person', '2-person', and '3+ person' brackets based on the 'persons' column. For zones with at least 50 households, calculate total_households, avg_persons_per_household, and the counts and percentages for each size bracket. Identify the top 5 zones with the highest percentage of 3+ person households and the top 5 zones with the highest percentage of 1-person households. Export the filtered zone-level data to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_household_sizes.csv and a bar chart comparing the household size distribution for these 10 zones to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/family_vs_single_zones.png. The notebook should be fully executed.
